description: Native analytics per marketplace, unified dashboard

items.name: MercadoLibre metrics
items.tactic: Views, clicks, sell-through-rate, feedback rating, seller reputation. Target 95%+.

items.name: Amazon metrics
items.tactic: ACoS, conversion_rate, ASIN ranking, review_count, BSR.

items.name: TikTok Shop metrics
items.tactic: Views, likes, saves, shares, CTR, average_order_value.

items.name: Unified KPI dashboard
items.tactic: Revenue, margin, CAC, LTV, ROI per platform. Compare profitability.

items.name: Anomaly detection
items.tactic: Sales suddenly 0 = delist? Competitor underselling? Auto-alert.
